products.title: Hydraulic Pump Assemblies
products.label: Excavator Parts
products.desc: High-pressure hydraulic pumps and valve blocks for excavators and backhoes. Engineered for long duty cycles on heavy construction sites.
overview: SAASA B2E TRADES supplies complete hydraulic pump assemblies and valve blocks for excavators, backhoes, and tracked loaders used on demanding construction sites.
Our parts are sourced from certified manufacturers and tested to meet OEM pressure ratings, ensuring reliable boom, arm, and swing circuit performance.
features: High-pressure rated for continuous duty cycles

products.title: Undercarriage Track Chains
products.label: Bulldozer Parts
products.desc: Track chains, sprockets, idlers, and rollers for bulldozers and tracked excavators. Heat-treated steel for abrasion resistance.
overview: We provide full undercarriage solutions including track chains, sprockets, idlers, and bottom rollers for bulldozers and tracked excavators.
Components are heat-treated for abrasion resistance in quarry, mining, and heavy civil environments where downtime is costly.
features: Extended wear life in abrasive soils

products.title: Loader Bucket Teeth & Adapters
products.label: Wheel Loader Parts
products.desc: Replaceable bucket teeth, adapters, and cutting edges for wheel loaders and front-end loaders used in quarry and site work.
overview: Replaceable bucket teeth, adapters, and cutting edges keep wheel loaders productive in quarry, aggregate, and construction material handling.
SAASA B2E TRADES stocks standard and heavy-duty profiles with quick-fit adapter systems to minimize machine downtime during change-outs.
features: Cutting edges and side cutters available

products.title: Crane Wire Rope & Sheaves
products.label: Crane Components
products.desc: Wire ropes, hook blocks, sheave assemblies, and safety latches for tower cranes and mobile cranes on high-rise projects.
overview: Our crane component range covers wire ropes, hook blocks, sheave assemblies, and safety latches for tower and mobile crane operations.
All load-bearing items are supplied with traceability documentation and can be matched to your crane model and duty classification.

products.title: Diesel Engine Overhaul Kits
products.label: Engine Parts
products.desc: Piston kits, gaskets, liners, and turbocharger parts for diesel engines powering excavators, loaders, and dump trucks.
overview: Complete diesel engine overhaul kits including pistons, liners, gaskets, and turbocharger components for construction machinery power units.
We support major engine platforms used in excavators, wheel loaders, and articulated dump trucks worldwide.
features: Full top-end and bottom-end kit options

products.title: Hydraulic Cylinder Seal Kits
products.label: Hydraulic Parts
products.desc: Seal kits, rod wipers, and cylinder repair parts for boom, arm, and bucket cylinders across all major machinery brands.
overview: Seal kits and cylinder repair components for boom, arm, bucket, and lift cylinders across all major heavy equipment brands.
Material options include NBR, polyurethane, and Viton for standard and high-temperature hydraulic applications.
features: Complete rod and piston seal sets

products.title: Concrete Mixer Drum Liners
products.label: Concrete Equipment
products.desc: Wear-resistant drum liners, mixing blades, and discharge chute parts for transit mixers and stationary batch plants.
overview: Wear-resistant drum liners, mixing blades, and discharge chute components for transit mixers and stationary batch plants.
SAASA B2E TRADES supports ready-mix producers and equipment rebuilders with custom-fabricated liner profiles and fast replacement cycles.

products.title: Road Roller Drum Kits
products.label: Compaction Parts
products.desc: Vibration drum assemblies, bearing kits, and scraper blades for single and double drum rollers on road construction.
overview: Vibration drum assemblies, bearing kits, and scraper blades for single-drum and double-drum rollers on road and site compaction work.
Our parts help contractors maintain consistent compaction performance throughout long highway and infrastructure projects.

products.title: Transmission & Gearbox Parts
products.label: Powertrain
products.desc: Clutch plates, torque converters, planetary gears, and final drive components for loaders, dozers, and graders.
overview: Powertrain components including clutch plates, torque converters, planetary gears, and final drives for loaders, dozers, and motor graders.
We supply remanufactured and new-stock options from leading transmission manufacturers to keep heavy fleets operational.

services.title: Construction equipment, Earthmoving, Industrial, and Port
services.summary: Supply, sourcing, and logistics for excavators, loaders, dozers, and port-handling equipment used on major construction and industrial projects.
overview: SAASA B2E TRADES supports contractors, rental fleets, and industrial operators with construction equipment supply and spare parts logistics across earthmoving, industrial, and port applications.
From yellow machines on civil sites to material handlers at port terminals, we connect you with the right equipment and components through a global supplier network.

services.title: Trucks for Transport and Distribution of Materials
services.summary: Heavy-duty trucks and distribution fleets for moving construction materials, aggregates, and bulk goods across regional and international routes.
overview: We help material producers and logistics companies source trucks built for transport and distribution of construction materials, aggregates, and bulk cargo.
SAASA B2E TRADES coordinates vehicle procurement, parts supply, and delivery logistics so your distribution network stays reliable and cost-effective.

services.title: Buses for people transport companies
services.summary: Coach and transit buses for passenger transport operators, including procurement support and aftermarket parts for fleet maintenance.
overview: SAASA B2E TRADES works with people transport companies to source modern coach and transit buses suited to intercity, tourism, and corporate shuttle operations.
We also supply maintenance parts and fleet support services to keep passenger operations safe, compliant, and on schedule.

services.title: Energy | Engines and Generators
services.summary: Industrial engines, generator sets, and power system components for construction sites, mines, and remote operations.
overview: Our energy division covers industrial diesel engines, generator sets, and supporting components for construction sites, mining camps, and remote power needs.
SAASA B2E TRADES sources new and remanufactured power units with the parts and service support required for continuous operation in harsh environments.

services.title: Mining and Quarrying equipment
services.summary: Heavy mining trucks, excavators, and wear parts for open-pit mining and quarry extraction operations worldwide.
overview: SAASA B2E TRADES supplies mining and quarrying equipment including ultra-class haul trucks, large excavators, and high-wear components for extraction operations.
We understand the uptime demands of open-pit mines and aggregate quarries and deliver parts and machinery through resilient global logistics channels.

blogs.title: Offered Coverage Flexibility in logistic Exports & Imports
blogs.author: Adam Smith
blogs.excerpt: Flexible export and import coverage for modern supply chains.
body: Logistics continues to evolve with smarter routing, real-time visibility, and integrated supply chain platforms. SAASA B2E TRADES helps businesses stay ahead with reliable freight solutions across road, sea, air, and rail.

From optimizing export coverage to improving last-mile delivery accuracy, modern logistics teams need partners who combine technology with operational excellence. Our experts work with you to design solutions that scale with your business.
Contact our team to learn how SAASA B2E TRADES can support your next shipment, fleet expansion, or global trade initiative.

portfolio.title: Freight Fleet Expansion
portfolio.label: Road Transport
portfolio.excerpt: Scaled regional road freight capacity with modern fleet assets and route optimization.
body: SAASA B2E TRADES supported a major freight operator with end-to-end procurement, delivery, and commissioning of new heavy-duty trucks for regional distribution.
The project included equipment sourcing, customs coordination, and driver-ready handover across multiple depots — reducing downtime and improving on-time delivery performance.
Contact our team to discuss fleet expansion, vehicle supply, or integrated logistics support for your operation.

portfolio.title: Electric Bus Fleet Implementation
portfolio.label: Transport
portfolio.excerpt: Introduced electric buses for urban transit with charging infrastructure planning.
body: We partnered with a municipal transport authority to source electric buses, charging systems, and maintenance support for a phased city rollout.
Our team managed vendor selection, import logistics, and technical documentation to align with local compliance and operational requirements.
Reach out to learn how we can support sustainable fleet transitions for buses, trucks, and port equipment.

portfolio.title: Smart Port Management System
portfolio.label: Port Logistics
portfolio.excerpt: Port equipment and systems integration for smarter cargo handling operations.
body: This engagement covered procurement of port-handling machinery, spare parts pipelines, and coordination with terminal operators for staged deployment.
SAASA B2E TRADES aligned equipment specifications with yard workflows to improve throughput and reduce idle time at the berth.
Ask us about port logistics, crane supply, and integrated equipment support for marine terminals.

portfolio.title: Container Ship Operations
portfolio.label: Sea Freight
portfolio.excerpt: Marine logistics support for container operations and vessel readiness.
body: We delivered marine equipment, spares, and technical supplies to support container vessel operations across key trade lanes.
The project emphasized reliable lead times, documentation accuracy, and coordinated deliveries to minimize vessel turnaround delays.
Contact us for sea freight support, marine parts supply, and global shipping logistics.

portfolio.title: Cross-Continental Rail Network
portfolio.label: Rail Freight
portfolio.excerpt: Rail freight equipment and rolling stock support for long-haul corridors.
body: SAASA B2E TRADES supplied rail-compatible freight equipment and coordinated cross-border logistics for an expanding rail corridor.
From wagons and locomotive components to maintenance planning, we helped the client standardize procurement across regions.
Speak with our specialists about rail freight equipment, parts, and corridor logistics.

reviews.name: Sarah Williams
reviews.quote: SAASA B2E TRADES sourced excavator hydraulic parts and undercarriage components for our fleet faster than our previous suppliers. Quotations were clear and deliveries arrived as promised.

reviews.name: Bessie Cooper
reviews.quote: We needed trucks and buses for a municipal rollout — their team handled supplier selection, import paperwork, and staged delivery across multiple depots professionally.

reviews.name: Jacob Jones
reviews.quote: From mining equipment inquiries to repeat parts orders, SAASA B2E has become our go-to trading partner. Responsive support and reliable sourcing across categories.

reviews.name: Amadou Diallo
reviews.quote: They supplied concrete mixers, road rollers, and spare parts for our highway project with consistent lead times. A dependable procurement partner for heavy machinery.

reviews.name: Grace Mbeki
reviews.quote: Crane parts, gearbox assemblies, and engine components were sourced to OEM specifications. Their team understands construction machinery requirements very well.

reviews.name: Pierre Nguemba
reviews.quote: Bucket teeth, track chains, and compactor spares keep our quarry running. SAASA B2E coordinates suppliers and shipping so we spend less time chasing orders.
